creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: flo
Date: Thu Oct 24 20:10:51 2013
New Revision: 331529
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331529

Log:
  - update to 3.15.2 [1]
  - support stage
  
  PR:		ports/183282 [1]
  Submitted by:	pfg [1]

Modified:
  head/security/ca_root_nss/Makefile
  head/security/ca_root_nss/distinfo
  head/security/nss/Makefile
  head/security/nss/distinfo

Modified: head/security/ca_root_nss/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/ca_root_nss/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 20:10:09 2013	(r331528)
+++ head/security/ca_root_nss/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 20:10:51 2013	(r331529)
@@ -2,7 +2,6 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	ca_root_nss
 PORTVERSION=	${VERSION_NSS}
-PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	security
 MASTER_SITES=	MOZILLA/security/nss/releases/${DISTNAME:U:C/[-.]/_/g}_RTM/src
 DISTNAME=	nss-${VERSION_NSS}${NSS_SUFFIX}
@@ -25,14 +24,13 @@ PLIST_SUB+=	CERTDIR=${CERTDIR}
 # !!!  Please DO NOT submit patches for new version until it has !!!
 # !!!  been committed there first.                               !!!
 # !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
-VERSION_NSS=	3.15.1
+VERSION_NSS=	3.15.2
 #NSS_SUFFIX=	.with.ckbi.1.93
 CERTDATA_TXT_PATH=	nss-${VERSION_NSS}/nss/lib/ckfw/builtins/certdata.txt
 BUNDLE_PROCESSOR=	MAca-bundle.pl
 SUB_FILES=	MAca-bundle.pl
 SUB_LIST=	VERSION_NSS=${VERSION_NSS}
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:METCSYMLINK}
@@ -55,10 +53,10 @@ do-build:	apply-slist
 	    ${WRKDIR}/ca-root-nss.crt
 
 do-install:
-	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/${CERTDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/ca-root-nss.crt ${PREFIX}/${CERTDIR}
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${CERTDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/ca-root-nss.crt ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${CERTDIR}
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:METCSYMLINK}
-	${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/${CERTDIR}/ca-root-nss.crt /etc/ssl/cert.pem
+	${LN} -sf ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${CERTDIR}/ca-root-nss.crt /etc/ssl/cert.pem
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/security/ca_root_nss/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/security/ca_root_nss/distinfo	Thu Oct 24 20:10:09 2013	(r331528)
+++ head/security/ca_root_nss/distinfo	Thu Oct 24 20:10:51 2013	(r331529)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (nss-3.15.1.tar.gz) = f994106a33d1f3210f4151bbb3419a1c28fd1cb545caa7dc9afdebd6da626284
-SIZE (nss-3.15.1.tar.gz) = 6286561
+SHA256 (nss-3.15.2.tar.gz) = 7b2c80d18c49581edbdb509cbf7afd61d8c53658f2a38ff20e224c1909faeddc
+SIZE (nss-3.15.2.tar.gz) = 6288669

Modified: head/security/nss/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/nss/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 20:10:09 2013	(r331528)
+++ head/security/nss/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 20:10:51 2013	(r331529)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	nss
-PORTVERSION=	3.15.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.15.2
 #DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	.with.ckbi.1.93
 CATEGORIES=	security
 MASTER_SITES=	MOZILLA/security/${PORTNAME}/releases/${DISTNAME:U:C/[-.]/_/g}_RTM/src
@@ -46,7 +46,6 @@ BINS=		${DIST}/${OPSYS}${OSREL}_OPT.OBJ
 BINS=		${DIST}/${OPSYS}${OSREL}_DBG.OBJ
 .endif
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 .if ${ARCH} == amd64
@@ -78,20 +77,20 @@ post-patch:
 		${XARGS} ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|#! */bin/bash|#!${SH}|'
 
 do-install:
-	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/include/nss/nss ${PREFIX}/lib/nss
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/include/nss/nss ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/nss
 	${FIND} ${DIST}/public/nss -type l \
-	    	-exec ${INSTALL_DATA} {} ${PREFIX}/include/nss/nss \;
+	    	-exec ${INSTALL_DATA} {} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/include/nss/nss \;
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${BINS}/lib/*.so.1 \
-		${PREFIX}/lib/nss
+		${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/nss
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${BINS}/lib/libcrmf.a \
-	    	${PREFIX}/lib/nss
+	    	${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/nss
 .for bin in ${INSTALL_BINS}
 	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${BINS}/bin/${bin} \
-		${PREFIX}/bin
+		${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
 .endfor
 	cd ${BINS}/lib && \
-	    	${TAR} -cf - *.so | ${TAR} --unlink -C ${PREFIX}/lib/nss -xf -
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/nss-config ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/nss.pc ${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig
+	    	${TAR} -cf - *.so | ${TAR} --unlink -C ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/nss -xf -
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/nss-config ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/nss.pc ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/security/nss/distinfo
==============================================================================

@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (nss-3.15.1.tar.gz) = f994106a33d1f3210f4151bbb3419a1c28fd1cb545caa7dc9afdebd6da626284
-SIZE (nss-3.15.1.tar.gz) = 6286561
+SHA256 (nss-3.15.2.tar.gz) = 7b2c80d18c49581edbdb509cbf7afd61d8c53658f2a38ff20e224c1909faeddc
+SIZE (nss-3.15.2.tar.gz) = 6288669
